transforms.name: whataburger__daily_grill_report
transforms.sql:
CREATE TABLE whataburger__daily_grill_report AS
SELECT
  pos.OrderId AS order_id,
  pos.BusinessDate AS business_date,
  pos.StoreNumber AS store_number,
  pos.OrderChannel AS order_channel,
  pos.Daypart AS daypart,
  SUM(pos.GrossSales) AS gross_sales,
  SUM(pos.DiscountAmount) AS discounts,
  SUM(pos.NetSales) AS net_sales,
  COUNT(DISTINCT pos.OrderId) AS order_count,
  SUM(mi.Quantity) AS units_sold,
  SUM(mi.AddOnRevenue) AS add_on_revenue
FROM raw.pos_order_sales pos
LEFT JOIN raw.menu_item_sales mi ON pos.OrderId = mi.OrderId
GROUP BY pos.OrderId, pos.BusinessDate, pos.StoreNumber, pos.OrderChannel, pos.Daypart;

transforms.name: whataburger__whataburger_locations
transforms.sql:
CREATE TABLE whataburger__whataburger_locations AS
SELECT
  STORE_NUMBER AS store_number,
  CONCAT(STORE_CITY, ' #', STORE_NUMBER) AS location_name,
  STORE_CITY AS city,
  STORE_STATE AS state,
  CASE WHEN STORE_CITY IN ('San Antonio', 'Houston') THEN 'South Texas' ELSE 'North Texas' END AS territory,
  DISTRIBUTION_REGION AS region
FROM raw.store_restaurants;

transforms.name: whataburger__bag_tickets
transforms.sql:
CREATE TABLE whataburger__bag_tickets AS
SELECT
  pos.OrderId AS order_id,
  pos.StoreNumber AS store_number,
  pos.BusinessDate AS business_date,
  COUNT(*) AS item_count,
  SUM(pos.NetSales) AS ticket_total,
  CASE WHEN COUNT(*) >= 5 THEN 'Large' WHEN COUNT(*) >= 3 THEN 'Medium' ELSE 'Small' END AS bag_size,
  pos.OrderChannel AS order_channel
FROM raw.pos_order_sales pos
LEFT JOIN raw.store_restaurants stores ON pos.StoreNumber = stores.STORE_NUMBER
GROUP BY pos.OrderId, pos.StoreNumber, pos.BusinessDate, pos.OrderChannel;

transforms.name: whataburger__grill_slips
transforms.sql:
CREATE TABLE whataburger__grill_slips AS
SELECT
  sales.OrderId AS order_id,
  sales.MenuItemId AS menu_item_id,
  items.MenuItemCategory AS category,
  sales.Quantity AS quantity,
  sales.NetSales AS line_revenue,
  CASE WHEN items.MenuItemCategory = 'Drinks' THEN 'Drink Station' ELSE 'Grill' END AS station_name,
  sales.PrepSeconds AS prep_seconds
FROM raw.menu_item_sales sales
LEFT JOIN raw.menu_items items ON sales.MenuItemId = items.MenuItemId;

transforms.name: whataburger__menu_board
transforms.sql:
CREATE TABLE whataburger__menu_board AS
SELECT
  items.MenuItemId AS menu_item_id,
  items.MenuItemName AS item_name,
  items.MenuItemCategory AS category,
  recipes.RecipeName AS menu_group,
  items.ListPrice AS list_price,
  items.ActiveFlag AS active_flag
FROM raw.menu_items items
LEFT JOIN raw.recipes recipes ON items.RecipeId = recipes.RecipeId;

transforms.name: whataburger__menu_item_pnl
transforms.sql:
CREATE TABLE whataburger__menu_item_pnl AS
SELECT
  sales.MenuItemId AS menu_item_id,
  sales.MenuItemCategory AS category,
  SUM(sales.Quantity) AS units_sold,
  SUM(sales.GrossSales) AS gross_revenue,
  SUM(sales.DiscountAmount) AS discounts,
  SUM(sales.NetSales) AS net_revenue,
  SUM(cost.Quantity * cost.UnitCost) AS food_cost,
  SUM(sales.NetSales) - SUM(cost.Quantity * cost.UnitCost) AS gross_margin
FROM raw.menu_item_sales sales
LEFT JOIN raw.recipe_ingredient_assignments cost ON sales.MenuItemId = cost.RecipeId
GROUP BY sales.MenuItemId, sales.MenuItemCategory;
